title: 2,700-year-old sword found standing upright in a Polish forest may reveal a forgotten Bronze Age ritual
summary_full: A 2,700-year-old bronze sword was discovered standing upright in a Polish forest. This unusual position suggests deliberate placement, possibly as a ritual offering. The well-preserved blade offers insights into Bronze Age craftsmanship and wealth. Similar discoveries have been made in the Gdańsk forest area before. This find adds significant detail to the region's ancient archaeological record.
